headline: The Dow Tests a Key Technical Threshold. Watching Apple, Home Depot Stocks.
summary: With the  and  not far behind, investors are watching closely to see whether this early test by the Dow marks the start of a broader move higher, or simply the latest hurdle in an uneven recovery.  Home Depot is down 4% over the past year, and 5% year to date.
